item.name: Firebird Whistle
item.description: A mysterious whistle that, when sounded, calls forth a fiery bird of Far Eastern legend.

mount.name: Firebird
mount.action: Summon forth your Firebird. Not Phoenix. Definitely not Phoenix.
mount.description: The Far East is home to numerous legends concerning birds of flame who sacrifice their lives to save the world, only to rise from the ashes of destruction to rule the skies once again. The Firebird is one of those legends...made a mount.
mount.tooltip:
I was hoping for a fine bird.
- Grimold
